creator: kvgu@uswest.net
text:
Making the Apache13-PHP3 port with mod_ssl-2.2.8 breaks during attempts to apply distribution patches for openssl-0.9.2b.  Returns asking which file to patch.  Engelschall responds that there is a problem with the openssl port.

How-To-Repeat: Try making the Apache1.3.6-PHP3 port with mod_ssl.
